title: Fog Distance Settings with Transition
description: Distance fog settings that include transition fog support (primarily for water).

fields.title: Fog Start
fields.description: The distance at which fog begins. For render distance type, this is a percentage (0.0-1.0). For fixed type, this is in blocks.

fields.title: Fog End
fields.description: The distance at which fog is fully opaque. For render distance type, this is a percentage (0.0-1.0). For fixed type, this is in blocks.

fields.title: Fog Color
fields.description: The color of the fog as a hex string (e.g., '#ABD2FF') or RGB array.

fields.title: Render Distance Type
fields.description: How fog distances are calculated. 'fixed' uses block distances, 'render' uses percentage of render distance.

fields.title: Transition Fog
fields.description: Settings for fog transition when entering this environment.

fields.title: Initial Fog
fields.description: The initial fog settings when entering transition.

fields.title: Minimum Percent
fields.description: The minimum fog percentage during transition.

fields.title: Mid Seconds
fields.description: Time in seconds to reach the mid-point of the transition.

fields.title: Mid Percent
fields.description: The fog percentage at the mid-point of transition.

fields.title: Max Seconds
fields.description: Total time in seconds for the full transition.
